Institutional-grade Tokenization Platform


InvestaX is a leading institutional-grade platform specializing in the compliant tokenization and distribution of real-world assets (RWAs) globally. Regulated by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS), InvestaX enables financial institutions and asset managers to compliantly issue, manage, and trade tokenized RWAs across a network of fintech platforms, exchanges and distribution partners
EXPLORE OUR SOLUTIONS
WATCH DEMO

Recognized Market Operator License (RMO) to operate an organised market for securities

Our Projects

THE ONLY PARTNER YOU NEED FORRWA TOKENIZATION

Institutional-grade solution for tokenized asset issuance, distribution, and trading.
Tokenization Advisory Service
With years of experience in launching RWA tokens to global markets, InvestaX provides strategic guidance and support throughout the entire RWA tokenization process, ensuring compliance, legal adherence, and cost efficiency.
LEARN MORE
Licensed Tokenization SaaS Platform
Our licensed tokenization SaaS platform is a one-stop  tokenization solution that enables the issuance, distribution, and trading of Real World Asset (RWA) Tokens.
LEARN MORE

EXPLORE MORE PROJECTS

WHY CHOOSE INVESTAX'S TOKENIZATIOnPLATFORM

Regulatory Compliance
InvestaX is among the few licensed RWA tokenization platforms in the market. Our platform is fully licensed by MAS to issue RWA tokens and operate organised trading venues for RWA tokens, catering to a global investor base.
End-to-End Tokenization Solution
Our service offers a one-stop solution for all your RWA token needs, including seamless banking integration, thorough user verification with our KYC module, flexible OTC trading options, primary issuance services, cutting-edge blockchain technology, and smart contract deployment
User-Friendly Interface
InvestaX’s tokenization platform simplifies the tokenization process, allowing issuers to easily link bank accounts, create security token offerings, customize tokenomics and offering terms, define target investor profiles, and more.
Frictionless Liquidity Solution
We provide a secondary marketplace cartering to global users. Currently, we also have a partnership with IX Swap as the world's first automated  market maker and liquidity solutions for RWA tokens.
Diverse Asset Support
InvestaX supports the tokenization of various asset classes, including real estate tokenization, digital bonds, tokenized stocks, pre-IPO companies, digi-SPACs, private equity/debt, employee stock option (digital ESOP), NFTs, among other assets.
Robust Blockchain Technology
We bring issuers a choice of leading blockchain protocols for real world asset tokenization, including layer 1 blockchains and layer 2 solutions, namely BASE, Ethereum, Algorand, Tezos, Hedera, Polygon and coming soon Klaytn.
INTERESTED IN TOKENIZING WITH US?

Our Projects

ENDORSED BYINDUSTRY LEADERS

Jani Rautiainen
Co-Founder of PropertyGuru Group
“Many real world asset investments are inaccessible for most investors and technologies like blockchain can help unlock these markets. Julian and Alice have been pioneering this space for years, and I strongly believe InvestaX is very well placed to become one of the leaders of this industry.”
Uten Lohachitpitaks
Group Chief Executive Officer of Pruksa Holding (PSH)
“InvestaX is breaking barriers and primed to lead the change of market structures in democratizing the real world assets.”
PwC Switzerland
CV VC
CV VC Global Report 2022
"InvestaX houses a leading team of experts across the capital markets and blockchain industries. Their platform sits at the core of a private markets ecosystem that delivers end-to-end digital securities issuance, investment, and divestment solutions."
*PwC Switzerland and CV VC featured InvestaX in CV VC Global Report 2022
Armin Choksey
Asia Pacific Asset and Wealth Management Market Research Centre Leader at PwC Singapore
“It has been a fantastic opportunity and an eye-opener to go through the various intricacies of tokenised VCC. One can’t assume it to be a straightforward procedure. This POC has helped identify the areas which must be considered at the time of launch as well as operating the tokens. I believe it will have long term benefits for the industry in this area.”
Joined Project E-VCC - a global first initiative led by InvestaX to explore the potential of tokenisation of the Singapore VCC structure
Matt Nortcliff
Partner and Head of Funds – APAC at CMS
“This is a timely and important project and we were delighted that InvestaX invited us to contribute our funds, tech and VCC expertise to the POC. Projects such as this POC are tremendously important in demonstrating that embracing and championing tokenised fund structures can be a positive step for Singapore and the asset management industry at large. Joined Project E-VCC - a global first initiative led by InvestaX to explore the potential of tokenisation of the Singapore VCC structure.”

Create Account

Step 2
KYC and Accreditation

Step 3
Start Investing
Fund your account and start investing and trading.

UNLOCKING THE FUTURE OF REAL WORLD ASSET TOKENIZATION WITH INVESTAX AND COINBASE
01:40
Paving the way for a blockchain native e-VCC regime
InvestaX, UBS, State Street, CMS, Tezos and PwC Singapore jointly completed the first tokenization of Singapore's Variable Capital Companies (VCC) fund structures, funded by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS).

Oops! Something went wrong while submitting the form.
Real-world asset (RWA) tokens are digital representations of real-world assets like equity or debt in real estate and private equity. Utilizing blockchain and smart contracts, they revolutionize investments by enhancing transparency, security, and efficiency. This innovation simplifies financial transactions and expands the range of financial instruments and structures.
InvestaX is a member of the Singapore Fintech Association (SFA)
Explore

Legal
DisclosuresPrivacy PolicyTerms of Use
General
About UsCareersPartnerships
Support
FAQContact Us
Important Notice: “InvestaX.io is operated by IC SG Pte. Ltd. (“InvestaX” or “IC SG”), a Singapore private limited company (Company Registration No. 201300459N). IC SG holds a Capital Markets Services license No. CMS100635 (“CMSL”) to deal in securities by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (the “Authority"), which allows IC SG to facilitate the primary offer and issuance of securities and act as an intermediary between issuers and investors. In addition, IC SG is licensed by the Authority as a recognised market operator to operate an organised market in respect of securities and units in collective investment schemes, the property of which consists only of capital markets products. (the “Organized Market”).The Organized Market allows investors to purchase securities from, and sell securities to other investors.
The InvestaX platform (“InvestaX Platform”) is a licensed and globally accessible digital asset investment platform that is at the forefront of technological innovation within the global financial services industry. It leverages distributed ledger technology and capital market innovations in the security or real-world asset (“RWA”) token sector delivering smooth secondary market trading and added value for token holders.
‍
The InvestaX Platform is operated by IC SG Pte. Ltd. (“IC SG”), which holds a Capital Markets Services license for dealing in securities and a Recognised Market Operator license from the Monetary Authority of Singapore.
By accessing this website or any of its subdomains, you agree to the InvestaX Platform's Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.The InvestaX Platform is designed for accredited, institutional and expert investors who are aware of and accept the risks involved with private investments. Please note that investments offered on the InvestaX Platform are not bank deposits and carry no guarantees.
‍
All products and services provided by the InvestaX Platform are offered on an "as-is" basis without any warranties. IC SG, its affiliates, and representatives shall not be held liable for any damages or losses, including punitive, special, or indirect damages, resulting from the use of the InvestaX Platform. The InvestaX Platform does not accept users from the United States or sanctioned countries. Access to the InvestaX Platform’s products and services requires users to fulfill all due diligence requirements, including comprehensive know-your-customer (KYC) and anti-money laundering (AML) checks.
‍
